events.title: Paul McCartney turns 84
events.blurb: Sir Paul McCartney, legendary co-founder of The Beatles, celebrates his 84th birthday.

angles.name: McCartney's Enduring Influence
angles.copy: Eighty-four years young and still inspiring generations. Happy birthday to the iconic Paul McCartney – what's your favourite Fab Four track or solo hit?

events.title: Alison Moyet turns 65
events.blurb: The powerful voice of Yazoo and a successful solo artist, Alison Moyet, celebrates her 65th birthday.

angles.name: Moyet's Distinctive Voice
angles.copy: That voice! Alison Moyet turns 65 today. From Yazoo to her incredible solo work, her vocals are simply unmistakable. Which song is your go-to?

events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: Grammy-winning singer, songwriter, and producer Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday.

angles.name: Richie's Smooth Sounds
angles.copy: Hello, is it his birthday you're looking for? Lionel Richie celebrates 77 years today! The master of smooth ballads and dancefloor fillers.

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: The iconic American singer, songwriter, and actress Cyndi Lauper celebrates her 73rd birthday.

angles.name: Lauper's Unforgettable Style
angles.copy: Girls (and boys) just wanna have fun! Happy 73rd birthday to the absolute legend that is Cyndi Lauper. Her music and style are truly timeless.

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering George Michael, who would have turned 63 today. The beloved British singer-songwriter passed away in 2016.

angles.name: Tribute to George Michael
angles.copy: Thinking of the incredible George Michael, who would have celebrated his 63rd birthday today. His voice and songwriting continue to inspire.

events.title: 17th anniversary of Michael Jackson's death
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the passing of the 'King of Pop,' Michael Jackson, at the age of 50.

angles.name: Remembering the King of Pop
angles.copy: 17 years ago, the world lost a true icon. Remembering Michael Jackson today and his unparalleled impact on music and culture. What's your favourite MJ moment?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat Goes On
angles.copy: Peace and love! Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr. The beat behind some of the greatest songs ever recorded.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: May's Legendary Guitar
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the incredible Brian May! His guitar riffs are legendary, and his solos are pure magic. What's your favourite Queen track featuring Brian?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The charismatic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Jagger's Enduring Energy
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Mick Jagger turns 83 today. An absolute rock and roll legend whose energy remains unmatched.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video aired.

angles.name: MTV Changed Everything
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV arrived and changed music forever. Remember the first video they played? 'Video Killed The Radio Star' – how ironic!

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis's seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released on this day in 1994, propelling them to global stardom.

angles.name: Britpop Classic Debut
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of a generation. What's your favourite track from that iconic album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, '3 Days of Peace & Music,' kicked off on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Remembering Woodstock
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million people descended on a farm in New York for three days of peace, love, and music. What an event! #Woodstock

events.title: 49th anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the 'King of Rock and Roll,' Elvis Presley.

angles.name: Tribute to The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, 49 years after his passing. His music lives on forever.

events.title: 30th anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur.

angles.name: Tribute to Tupac
angles.copy: 30 years ago today, we lost a lyrical genius. Remembering the enduring legacy of Tupac Shakur.

events.title: 56th anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix.

angles.name: Remembering Hendrix's Genius
angles.copy: 56 years since the world said goodbye to Jimi Hendrix. His innovative guitar playing continues to influence countless musicians.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album was released on this day in the UK in 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Abbey Road
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is as famous as the music within it. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Hynde's Rock Legacy
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock trailblazer and the voice of The Pretenders.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam's Rock N Roll Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that rock 'n' roll swagger. What's your favourite tune he's sung?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' single 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released on this day in the US in 1971, becoming a timeless anthem for peace.

angles.name: Lennon's Anthem of Hope
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon gave the world 'Imagine'. A song that continues to resonate with its powerful message of peace and unity.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled its revolutionary first-generation iPod on this day in 2001, forever changing how we listen to music.

angles.name: The iPod Revolution
angles.copy: Remember life before this? 25 years ago today, Apple launched the original iPod. It put 1,000 songs in your pocket and changed everything!
